chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2077 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8216/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8217/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.8218/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 08.12.2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the Petitioner will approach before the appropriate forum for redressal of his grievance as provided under the law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
